description: Dashboard automatisé — Pipeline Spark → NLP → PostgreSQL

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ca_total,0) AS v FROM kpi_global ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(nb_commandes,0) AS v FROM kpi_global ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(croissance_globale,0) AS v FROM kpi_global ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(panier_moyen,0) AS v FROM kpi_global ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(nb_clients,0) AS v FROM kpi_global ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT score AS v FROM rapports_nlp ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    score AS "Score NLP"
FROM rapports_nlp
ORDER BY generated_at DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
    CASE niveau
        WHEN 'ALERTE' THEN '🔴 ALERTE'
        ELSE '🟡 INFO'
    END AS "Niveau",
    'T' || trimestre || ' ' || annee AS "Période",
    ROUND(variation::numeric, 1) || '%' AS "Variation",
    ventes AS "Ventes ($)",
    description AS "Description"
FROM anomalies
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
ORDER BY
    CASE niveau WHEN 'ALERTE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    ABS(variation) DESC

options.content:
📊 Rapport Business Automatique

Généré par Mistral (Transformer) | Pipeline NLP Reporting

📈 Analyse des Performances

Le chiffre d'affaires total a augmenté de 49,5% au cours de la période 2015-2018. La meilleure année a été 2018 avec des revenus de 713 927 $ et 3 145 commandes.

Le trimestre le plus fort : T4 2017 avec une croissance de +69,45% atteignant 230 957 $ en ventes. Le trimestre le plus faible : T1 2016 avec une chute de -64,9%.

🏆 Top 3 Sous-catégories

Rang Sous-catégorie Ventes (USD)
🥇 Phones 327 528 $
🥈 Chairs 322 823 $
🥉 Storage 212 303 $
🎯 Score de Performance : 81/100

Mention : Très bien

Rapport généré automatiquement par le pipeline : Spark → NLTK → Mistral (Transformer) → PostgreSQL

📌 RÉSUMÉ EXÉCUTIF

3 points clés générés par NLP

1. CROISSANCE

Croissance globale de 49.5% sur la période 2015–2018, avec un chiffre d'affaires record de 713,927 USD en 2018.

2. MEILLEURE PERFORMANCE

Meilleure performance trimestrielle : T4 2017 (+69.45%), portée par la catégorie Phones (327,528 USD).

3. ⚠️ ALERTE

Chute de 64.9% au T1 2016 (62,137 USD). Analyse recommandée.

🤖 Ce résumé a été généré automatiquement par le pipeline NLP (NLTK + Mistral Transformer)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    segment AS "Segment",
    SUM(ventes_segment)::float AS "Ventes"
FROM kpi_segment
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
  AND segment IN (${segment:sqlstring})
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY SUM(ventes_segment) DESC

SELECT
    region,
    SUM(ventes_totales)::float AS ventes
FROM kpi_region_trim
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
  AND region IN (${region:sqlstring})
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY ventes DESC

SELECT
    category AS "Catégorie",
    SUM(ventes_categorie)::float AS "Ventes"
FROM kpi_categorie
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
  AND category IN (${category:sqlstring})
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY SUM(ventes_categorie) DESC

SELECT 
    sub_category AS "Sous-catégorie",
    ventes_totales AS "Ventes"
FROM kpi_top_produits
ORDER BY ventes_totales DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
    annee::text AS "Année",
    ca_annuel AS "Chiffre d'Affaires"
FROM kpi_annuel
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
ORDER BY annee

SELECT
    region AS "Région",
    SUM(CASE WHEN trimestre = 1 THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END) AS "T1",
    SUM(CASE WHEN trimestre = 2 THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END) AS "T2",
    SUM(CASE WHEN trimestre = 3 THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END) AS "T3",
    SUM(CASE WHEN trimestre = 4 THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END) AS "T4",
    SUM(ventes_totales) AS "Total"
FROM kpi_region_trim
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
  AND region IN (${region:sqlstring})
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY SUM(ventes_totales) DESC

SELECT
    'T' || trimestre || '-' || annee AS "Trimestre",
    variation_pct AS "Variation"
FROM kpi_variation
WHERE variation_pct IS NOT NULL
  AND annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
ORDER BY annee, trimestre

SELECT
    annee::text AS annee,
    SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'West' THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END)::float AS "West",
    SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'East' THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END)::float AS "East",
    SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'Central' THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END)::float AS "Central",
    SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'South' THEN ventes_totales ELSE 0 END)::float AS "South"
FROM kpi_region_trim
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
  AND region IN (${region:sqlstring})
GROUP BY annee
ORDER BY annee

SELECT
    annee::text AS annee,
    SUM(CASE WHEN segment = 'Consumer' THEN ventes_segment ELSE 0 END)::float AS "Consumer",
    SUM(CASE WHEN segment = 'Corporate' THEN ventes_segment ELSE 0 END)::float AS "Corporate",
    SUM(CASE WHEN segment = 'Home Office' THEN ventes_segment ELSE 0 END)::float AS "Home Office"
FROM kpi_segment
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
  AND segment IN (${segment:sqlstring})
GROUP BY annee
ORDER BY annee

SELECT
    date_mois AS time,
    nb_commandes AS "Commandes"
FROM kpi_mensuel
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
ORDER BY date_mois

SELECT
    date_mois AS time,
    ventes_mensuelles AS "Ventes"
FROM kpi_mensuel
WHERE annee::text IN (${annee:sqlstring})
ORDER BY date_mois
